tool_args.label: Curb regulation changes for parking and loading

payload.location_text: Fresh Pond Rd and spur streets
payload.description: Block-by-block curb regulation changes including new part-time loading zones, additional metered spaces on spurs, convert 2-hour meters to 1 hour on Fresh Pond Rd, studying signal timing, bus stop consolidation

payload.location_text: Spur streets near Fresh Pond Rd
